title: mirbelia ferricola
intro: Mirbelia ferricola, also known as the blue mountain mirbelia, is a flowering plant species native to eastern Australia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mirbelia ferricola include relief from minor wounds, skin irritations, and colds. The herbal preparations of Mirbelia ferricola include tea, infusion, and poultice, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with other herbal ingredients.
